title: Robbie Storey
extract:
Robbie Storey (born 21 October 1999) is an English professional rugby league footballer who plays as a centre for the Townsville Blackhawks in the Queensland Cup, after playing for the London Broncos in the Super League the year before.
He has previously played for AS Carcassonne in the Elite One Championship, the Dewsbury Rams and Keighley Cougars in the Championship as well as previously playing for Doncaster in League 1.
